title: ilex juttana
intro: Ilex juttana, also known as the Jutti or Jutti Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the holly family (Aquifoliaceae). It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against certain infections. Ilex juttana is used to prepare various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
